description: This file defines a MySQL repository module for managing various 'holistic persona' related data, including recommendations, comparisons, paths, milestones, and scoring. It exports functions for upserting and retrieving data from specific database tables, with JSON parsing utilities and a collection of exported methods.

methods.name: _jsonParseIfNeeded
methods.description: Utility function to parse JSON strings if needed, handling nulls and objects.

methods.name: upsertRecommendationsRoles
methods.description: Inserts or updates the latest role recommendations for a user, persona, or build.

methods.name: getLatestRecommendationsRoles
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent role recommendations based on the most specific identifier provided.

methods.name: createRecommendationsCompare
methods.description: Stores a comparison matrix of roles between two entities.

methods.name: getLatestRecommendationsCompare
methods.description: Fetches the latest comparison for a build or overall for a pair of roles.

methods.name: upsertPathsMultiverse
methods.description: Persists paths multiverse data for a user, persona, or build.

methods.name: getLatestPathsMultiverse
methods.description: Retrieves the latest paths multiverse data based on priority.

methods.name: upsertPlanMilestones
methods.description: Stores a milestones plan for a user, persona, or build.

methods.name: getLatestPlanMilestones
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent milestones plan.

methods.name: upsertProfileScoring
methods.description: Stores profile scoring data, including overrides.

methods.name: getLatestProfileScoring
methods.description: Retrieves the latest profile scoring data.
